common_semantics.source_position_id: Visible peer/source position in a directed exposure edge.
common_semantics.target_position_id: Exposed receiver/target position in a directed exposure edge.
common_semantics.rank_for_receiver: Rank of source among incoming exposure peers for a target receiver.

nodes.csv.description: Canonical observed network positions and basic role/readiness labels.

edges_prompt_top30.csv.description: Top incoming exposure edges per receiver for bounded prompt exemplar selection.

node_metrics.csv.description: Node centrality, community, bridge, and prompt-readiness metrics.

neighborhood_metrics.csv.description: Incoming/outgoing exposure volume, concentration, diversity, and H2 readiness metrics.

propagation_metrics.csv.description: One-hop/two-hop reach and H3/H4 structural readiness metrics.

assignment_positions.csv.description: Deterministic ranked positions used by Stage 01b profile-position assignment.
